arts.ttl: Big selection surprises as Portsmouth boss makes four changes for Bristol City clash
arts.sum: John Mousinho has rotated his squad for the trip to Bristol City during the hectic Christmas schedule.

arts.ttl: Bristol City vs Portsmouth LIVE team news, starting lineups and updates
arts.sum: Pompey hope to end 2024 on a high as they play the Robins in their final game of the year.

arts.ttl: Zak Vyner on Christmas 'chaos', Bristol City competition, back-to-back wins and Portsmouth test
arts.sum: While Bristol City returned to winning ways with a 1-0 win over Luton Town on Boxing Day, the Robins have little time to celebrate as the busy festive period is set to throw up another tricky test. The Reds boss himself has emphasised the importance of registering consecutive results, but City defender Zak Vyner admits that he and his teammates in the Robins' changing room aren't losing any sleep over their inconsistency at this moment in time.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss John Mousinho has one more dig at Watford as he prepares to face Bristol City side set for revenge
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes Bristol City will be seeking revenge when Pompey travel to Ashton Gate today.

arts.ttl: Is Bristol City v Portsmouth on TV? Kick-off time and how to watch Championship fixture
arts.sum: Pompey are away to the Robins in their final EFL Championship game of 2024.

arts.ttl: The defender who is set to save Portsmouth hundreds of thousands in January transfer window
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes defender Connor Ogilvie is finally showing his Championship class.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth predicted XI and bench v Bristol City as one change made and defender recalled to squad
arts.sum: It was only three weeks ago when Pompey thrashed Bristol City 3-0 at Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: Every word Manning said on Luton win, 'embarrassing' Bristol City penalty call, Sykes and more
arts.sum: I thought we were really aggressive in duels, won numerous headers, managed the second balls really well and, yeah, I’m delighted we found a way, the lads deserve all the credit they get for today. He can play on the left and the right, and yeah I think with Ross and a lot of the other lads, having the depth, having the options, having the competition is so important especially when you have four games in 10 days.

A long-range strike from Scott Twine was all that separated the sides at full time on Boxing Day as Bristol City edged a 1-0 home win against a struggling Luton side. That victory ended a four-match...

arts.ttl: Defender hands Portsmouth injury boost ahead of Bristol City and Swansea games - with another 'close'
arts.sum: Jordan Williams has handed Pompey a welcome injury boost.
